name_en: 💰Highest market version (original sample quality) authentic prototype
name_cn:
💰Highest market version (original sample quality) authentic prototype
[Guaranteed imported top-grain cowhide, no split leather, no microfiber]
Saddle Long Wallet with Zipper
Black hand-stitched inlaid grain cowhide paired with beige and black Oblique printed fabric
Number: 2ADBC315YKS_H05E
This saddle long wallet is understated yet elegant. Crafted with black hand-stitched inlaid grain cowhide and beige and black Oblique printed fabric, it reinterprets the classic saddle silhouette, featuring a metal-plated copper alloy Dior logo on the front for a touch of class. The center zip pocket holds coins, while the double-layer cash compartment and 12 card slots provide ample storage space. Elegant and spacious, it is an ideal companion for daily use.
Main material: Cotton, Cowhide, Technical fabric
Lining: Cowhide, Technical fabric
Internal zip pocket
12 card slots
Double-layer cash compartment
Front features metal-plated copper alloy Dior logo
Interior features Dior embossed logo
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 19.8 x 11 cm (Length x Height)
Fits bank cards
